title: BetterGrass
description: Improves the saturation of the grass, because it could be better!
body:
The usual color of the grass in the game may have bored you! Therefore, to create a more juicy picture of the game was created resourcepack bettergrass. It works on all versions of the game and does not need any additional modifications.

But our resourcepack was not created on the basis of the usual green saturated color, because for this we used the color of moss!

Among other notes can be noted:
- Changing the color of the foliage
- The color of the grass in all biomes is the same

Also, check out the non-comparisons:
![Comparison of grass block with and without pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lztZdquj/images/3503b9be5f1ea61804759c4eec21977600d513ec.png)

![Comparison of grassy mountain with and without pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lztZdquj/images/5c6677fdb873eae537a36b10f694555c1300bed8.png)

![Comparison of grass next to tree with and without pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lztZdquj/images/87a39c31f7758844479a311de44c9f02e3253cab.png)
